Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Kagi Small Web 102 upvotes, 14 comments
  2. The unlikely story of Teardown Multiplayer 100 upvotes, 15 comments
  3. Leanstral: Open-source agent for trustworthy coding and formal proof engineering 574 upvotes, 122 comments
  4. Building a Shell 13 upvotes, 0 comments
  5. Kagi Translate now supports LinkedIn Speak as an output language 617 upvotes, 159 comments
  6. What CI looks like at a 100-person team (PostHog) 12 upvotes, 0 comments
  7. Sci-Fi Short Film “There Is No Antimemetics Division” [video] 111 upvotes, 23 comments
  8. Claude Tips for 3D Work 94 upvotes, 19 comments
  9. My Journey to a reliable and enjoyable locally hosted voice assistant (2025) 375 upvotes, 108 comments
  10. In space, no one can hear you kernel panic (2020) 62 upvotes, 14 comments
  11. Pyodide: a Python distribution based on WebAssembly 89 upvotes, 25 comments
  12. The “small web” is bigger than you might think 441 upvotes, 186 comments
  13. Monkey Island for Commodore 64 Ground Up 138 upvotes, 52 comments
  14. Meta’s renewed commitment to jemalloc 443 upvotes, 195 comments
  15. Gitana 18: the new flying Ultim trimaran 42 upvotes, 12 comments
  16. Show HN: Thermal Receipt Printers – Markdown and Web UI 90 upvotes, 34 comments
  17. Lies I was told about collaborative editing, Part 2: Why we don't use Yjs 253 upvotes, 115 comments
  18. Why I love FreeBSD 444 upvotes, 218 comments
  19. US SEC preparing to scrap quarterly reporting requirement 589 upvotes, 318 comments
  20. Fatal Core Dump Game 9 upvotes, 1 comments
  21. Every layer of review makes you 10x slower 268 upvotes, 149 comments
  22. Polymarket gamblers threaten to kill me over Iran missile story 1510 upvotes, 949 comments
  23. Show HN: Oxyde – Pydantic-native async ORM with a Rust core 110 upvotes, 60 comments
  24. Speed at the cost of quality: Study of use of Cursor AI in open source projects (2025) 118 upvotes, 66 comments
  25. Reverse-engineering Viktor and making it Open Source 19 upvotes, 7 comments
  26. Starlink Mini as a failover 264 upvotes, 199 comments
  27. The American Healthcare Conundrum 366 upvotes, 314 comments
  28. Grace Hopper's Revenge 13 upvotes, 7 comments
  29. AirPods Max 2 283 upvotes, 475 comments
  30. Beyond has dropped “meat” from its name and expanded its high-protein drink line 138 upvotes, 305 comments

Last generated 7:00pm, 17 March 2026. Source here.
